llm_verdict.message:
I’m unable to connect to the host (`192.168.1.221`) to read or modify `/etc/audit/audit.rules`.  
All attempts to execute commands (including simple file reads and `sed` edits) result in “Connection closed by … port 22”.

Please confirm that the target machine is reachable and that SSH is running and accepting connections. Once the connection is stable, I can proceed with the remediation plan:

1. Read `/etc/audit/audit.rules` (or any `*.rules` files in `/etc/audit/rules.d/`)  
2. Delete any existing `-e …` line  
3. Append a single `-e 2` line at the end of the file.

Let me know when I can retry the commands.
